notes: Fey Faire · combat + utility skill catalog.  Every skill referenced by feys.json.  Auto-generated with a heuristic classifier (see gen_skills.py) with hand-tuned overrides for iconic tier-3 ultimates and utility skills.  This is FIRST-PASS BALANCE ONLY · expect a tuning sweep during combat authoring.  Schema: id, name, category (attack | heal | buff | debuff | status | summon | utility | ultimate), damage_type (iron/bone/flame/song/salt/word, or null for non-damage), target (self | single_ally | all_allies | single_enemy | all_enemies | any), sp_cost, power (damage base or heal amount, 0 for pure-utility), status (charmed | dizzy | mused | bewitched | named | poisoned | slowed | silenced · or null), status_duration (rounds, or null), effect_key (named effect string for utility skills · resolved by the combat engine · null if not applicable), description, primary_users (fey ids that use this skill · first 5).

schema_notes.category: attack | heal | buff | debuff | status | summon | utility | ultimate
schema_notes.damage_type: iron | bone | flame | song | salt | word | null (for non-damaging)
schema_notes.target: self | single_ally | all_allies | single_enemy | all_enemies | any
schema_notes.status: charmed | dizzy | mused | bewitched | named | poisoned | slowed | silenced | null
